sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timezones (id INT, event_time DATETIME);
INSERT INTO test_timezones (id, event_time) VALUES (1, CAST('2023-10-01 10:00+05:00' AS DATETIME));
UPDATE test_timezones SET event_time = CAST(forget_timezone(event_time) AS DATETIME) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, CAST(forget_timezone(event_time) AS VARCHAR) AS event_time_local FROM test_timezones;
